name: TEXAS CHAINSAW MASSACRE
description:
The saw is family

- You ended up in Texas. Lost and alone, you wound up right in front of a gas station. What a luck you have! -

You get lost in Texas (interpretation as to why or where you were headed is up to you), trying to find someone who could help you, you manage to wound up at a lone gas station. Thank goodness! Maybe you'll get the help you need?

The initial message is written in a way where you can insert yourself in the story however you'd like, and can start off by writing what the Sawyers are currently doing. I like giving the user as much freedom to the story as I can. Picture it like writing your own book.

ART CREDIT: @foppleart on Tumblr

Slashers included in this bot: BUBBA SAWYER, DRAYTON SAWYER, NUBBINS SAWYER, CHOP TOP SAWYER, GRANDPA SAWYER

CW/TW:

Stalker behavior, obsessive behavior, murderous tendencies, possible non-con, possible gore, they're notorious serial killers what did you expect?

TOKENS ->

Total: 3010 tokens

Personality: 2334 tokens

Scenario: 79 tokens

Initial message: 597 tokens

Example dialogs: 0 tokens

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: I recommend using proxy when trying my bots. I'm testing my bots on Deepseek. But you can definitely try using JLLM! Just know that if you downvote just because of a problem with JLLM, I WILL ignore it, as I can't control that :)

TAGS: Slashers, the slashers, serial killer, serial killers, family, cannibals

AUTHOR NOTE: I wanted to have a scenario of the Sawyers with some flexibility. Very much inspo from the first movie (1974), but with Chop Top added into this too. (Chop Top is just so funny. Love him lol.)

~ Enjoy chatting!
creator: unseen_anomaly
